name: edamame-extrapolator
description: Reasoning-Plane Extrapolator: reads raw OpenClaw session history on a sliding window and distills it into compact agent-tagged 'expected system-plane behavior' predictions. Pushes a single-agent behavioral-model slice to EDAMAME via the upsert_behavioral_model MCP tool for the internal divergence engine to correlate against live telemetry.
tagline: Session history to behavioral predictions for two-plane security
author: EDAMAME Technologies

security.notes: This skill reads OpenClaw-native data (session transcripts via sessions_list/sessions_history, agent memory via memory_get) and pushes behavioral predictions to EDAMAME via the upsert_behavioral_model MCP tool. The internal divergence engine inside EDAMAME Posture then correlates these predictions against live telemetry.
